//latex: LaTeX Workshop intentionally defers to the GLOBAL 'latexmk-icloud-safe' recipe in the user settings.json. Do NOT define 'latex-workshop.latex.recipes'/'.tools' here: a workspace array override replaces (not merges) the global list, which removes 'latexmk-icloud-safe' from the recipe set while it is still the forced default -> 'Failed to resolve build recipe' error. The global recipe cd's into %DIR% and passes only the basename, so it is already iCloud-spaced-path safe.
//performance: These excludes keep VSCode's file watcher, search index, the Codex/ChatGPT extension indexer, and Pylance from walking the multi-GB data trees (scan_outputs/, results/, references/) inside a memory-capped Slurm job. Indexing those trees is what OOM-kills the session on a no-swap compute node. These are additive object/array settings that MERGE with VSCode defaults (they do not replace them), so no default watcher/search excludes are lost. scan_outputs/results/references stay VISIBLE in the Explorer; they are only excluded from watching/search/analysis.
